aria.description: Click to open or close the login form. Use Enter or Space to activate.

forgottenPasswordSuccessRoute.description: Check your email and follow the instructions

forgottenPasswordSuccessful.heading: Forgot password
forgottenPasswordSuccessful.info1: If you have an account with us, we sent you an email with a link to reset your password. If it doesn't arrive, check your spam or resend it.
forgottenPasswordSuccessful.info2: To reset your password, please open your email address and click the reset link.
